testcase.name: Open login page and verify Standard environment
testcase.system-out: Given I open the application url "BASE_URL"..............................skipped Then the "username" input should be visible..............................skipped And the "password" input should be visible...............................skipped And the "login" button should be visible.................................skipped And the page url should contain "BASE_DOMAIN"............................skipped

testcase.name: Open login page and verify Standard environment [1]
testcase.system-out: Given I open the application url "QA_URL"................................skipped Then the "username" input should be visible..............................skipped And the "password" input should be visible...............................skipped And the "login" button should be visible.................................skipped And the page url should contain "QA_DOMAIN"..............................skipped

testcase.name: Open login page and verify Standard environment [2]
testcase.system-out: Given I open the application url "SIT_URL"...............................skipped Then the "username" input should be visible..............................skipped And the "password" input should be visible...............................skipped And the "login" button should be visible.................................skipped And the page url should contain "SIT_DOMAIN".............................skipped
